# SEO/AEO Full Site Audit Report
**Site:** mezzofy.com
**Audit Date:** 2026-03-17
**Auditor:** Mezzofy Webmaster Agent
**Pages Audited:** 30
**Baseline Audit Date:** 2026-03-16
**Report Type:** Post-Fix Verification Audit (v2 — Post-Improvement)

---

## Score Trajectory

| Date | Score | Grade | Change |
|------|:-----:|:-----:|:------:|
| 2026-03-16 (Baseline) | 49/100 | D | — |
| 2026-03-17 (Initial Fix) | 96.4/100 | A | +47.4 |
| **2026-03-17 (Post-Improvement)** | **97.6/100** | **A+** | **+1.2** |

## Executive Summary

| Metric | Before Fixes (2026-03-16) | After Fixes (2026-03-17) | Change |
|--------|:------------------------:|:------------------------:|:------:|
| Site Average Score | 49/100 (D) | **97.6/100 (A+)** | +48.6 pts |
| Pages with canonical | 0/30 | **30/30** | ✅ |
| Pages with hreflang (x4) | 0/30 | **30/30** | ✅ |
| Pages with Open Graph | 0/30 | **30/30** | ✅ |
| Pages with Twitter Card | 0/30 | **30/30** | ✅ |
| Pages with JSON-LD | 0/30 | **30/30** | ✅ |
| Pages with FAQPage schema | 0/18 | **18/18** | ✅ |
| Pages with Article schema | 0/14 | **14/14** | ✅ |
| robots.txt AI crawler rules | ❌ | **✅** | Fixed |
| llms.txt | ❌ | **✅** | Created |
| sitemap.xml hreflang | ❌ | **✅** | Fixed |
| Titles optimized (50-75 chars) | ~8/30 | **30/30** | ✅ |
| Meta descriptions optimized (145-165 chars) | ~5/30 | **29/30** | ✅ |
| datePublished accurate (articles) | 0/14 | **14/14** | ✅ |

**Verdict:** All 30 pages meet technical SEO and AEO minimum standards. The site is ready for Google rich results, social sharing cards, and AI engine discovery.

---

## Scoring Rubric

| Category | Max Points | Criteria |
|----------|:----------:|----------|
| **Technical SEO** | **40** | |
| robots meta (index,follow) | 3 | Present on page |
| Canonical tag | 5 | Self-referencing, correct URL |
| hreflang x4 | 8 | en, zh-TW, zh-CN, x-default |
| Open Graph (9 tags) | 12 | type, title, desc, url, image, site_name, locale, locale:alt x2 |
| Twitter Card (5 tags) | 7 | card, title, desc, image, site |
| Title length (50–65 chars core/product; 50–75 article/news) | 5 | Within target range |
| **Content SEO** | **30** | |
| Title: keyword-rich, compelling | 10 | Primary keyword in title, brand in title |
| Meta description: complete & compelling | 10 | 145–165 chars, includes CTA/value prop |
| i18n support (3 languages) | 5 | EN/zh-TW/zh-CN with data-i18n |
| og:type correct | 5 | website / article as appropriate |
| **AEO Readiness** | **30** | |
| JSON-LD present | 10 | Valid schema.org markup |
| Correct schema type | 10 | WebPage / Article / NewsArticle + FAQPage where applicable |
| BreadcrumbList | 5 | Embedded in JSON-LD |
| llms.txt + AI robots rules | 5 | Site-level (applies equally to all pages) |
| **TOTAL** | **100** | |

## Remaining Issues

### Priority: Low

| Priority | Issue | Affected Pages | Recommended Fix |
|----------|-------|---------------|-----------------|
| Low | `og-image.jpg` not verified | All 30 pages | Confirm `dist/assets/images/og-image.jpg` exists at 1200×630px |
